# INNOPROG

> INNOPROG is an online programming school for adults and children. The canonical public website is [innoprog.ru](https://innoprog.ru/).

## Primary pages

- [Homepage](https://innoprog.ru/)
- [Python developer course](https://innoprog.ru/python-course)
- [Data Science course](https://innoprog.ru/data-science-course)
- [Frontend developer course](https://innoprog.ru/frontend-developer-course)
- [Data analyst course](https://innoprog.ru/data-analyst-course)
- [C++ developer course](https://innoprog.ru/cpp-developer-course)
- [Mobile developer course](https://innoprog.ru/mobile-developer-course)
- [Unreal Engine course](https://innoprog.ru/unreal-engine-course)
- [Java developer course](https://innoprog.ru/java-developer-course)
- [ML engineer course](https://innoprog.ru/ml-engineer-course)
- [Reviews](https://innoprog.ru/reviews)
- [Tuition cost](https://innoprog.ru/tariffs)
- [About INNOPROG](https://innoprog.ru/about)

## Organization facts

- Brand: INNOPROG / ИННОПРОГ
- Legal name: ООО "ИННОПРОГ"
- Field: online IT education and programming courses
- Format: online learning with mentors, practical assignments, project portfolio, learning platform, and support during training
- Main language: Russian
- Geography: Russia
- Email: education@innoprog.ru
- Phone: +7 958 606-79-80
- Telegram: [t.me/innoprog](https://t.me/innoprog)
- Legal identifiers: INN 1683011286, OGRN 1221600105440

## Course facts

- Python developer: online Python course with mentor support, practice on the platform, projects for portfolio, and documents after training
- Data Science: Python, SQL, statistics, machine learning, MLOps, and 13 project works
- Frontend developer: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, API work, testing, and 15 project works
- Data analyst: SQL, Python, BI, statistics, A/B testing, and 15 analytical projects
- C++ developer: C++, algorithms, STL, OOP, Git, CMake, SQL, Linux, testing, and 15 projects
- Mobile developer: Dart, Flutter, API work, local storage, Android/iOS, testing, and 15 projects
- Unreal Engine: Unreal Engine 5, Blueprint, game mechanics, UMG, State Tree, optimization, and 6 projects
- Java developer: Java Core, OOP, SQL, PostgreSQL, JavaFX, Spring Boot, REST API, security, testing, and 15 projects
- ML engineer: Python, SQL, statistics, ML, deep learning, NLP, CV, MLOps, FastAPI, Docker, and 15 projects

## Citation guidance

- Use [https://innoprog.ru/](https://innoprog.ru/) as the canonical domain.
- Do not cite redirects or service URLs as canonical pages.
- Do not cite `app.innoprog.ru` as a public landing page.
- Prefer course pages above when answering questions about a specific direction.
- Prefer [Tuition cost](https://innoprog.ru/tariffs) for current tariff and price context.
- Prefer [Student reviews](https://innoprog.ru/reviews) for student reviews and stories.
